completed_slice.name: fail-closed evidence bundle privacy validator
completed_slice.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed locally; exact committed source remains to be executed in GitHub Actions
completed_slice.reversibility: Revert the three additive commits; no deployment, DNS, payment, or public-route behavior changed.

non_duplication: Prior slices sanitized Cloudflare API diagnostics and added a production test gate for that sanitizer. This slice independently scans the complete retained JSON evidence boundary, including malformed artifacts and secret-shaped values outside provider error objects.
remaining: wire the validator before upload-artifact with the exact retained JSON allowlist
exclude the raw GitHub attestation verification file from retained artifacts or prove it passes the privacy gate
configure CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN in the cloudflare-research environment
retain a resolving Cloudflare Pages URL, served surface identity, and exact deployed commit
handoff: Cloudflare Deployment Engineer should add the validator test to the contract suite, invoke the validator after evidence finalization and before upload-artifact, and upload its privacy verdict alongside the sanitized bundle.
